description: Create a channel named 'ADT Filter Channel' in NextGen Connect that listens on TCP port 6662 and filters HL7 messages to only accept ADT types (MSH-9), rejecting all other message types. Ensure the channel XML includes a <responseTransformer> element in destination connectors. Verify the filter logic using the test messages at /home/ga/sample_adt_message.hl7 and /home/ga/sample_oru_message.hl7. The REST API is available at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin) and requires the 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI' header. The web dashboard at https://localhost:8443 is monitoring-only. You can use the terminal window to interact with the system. Note: File Writer output files are created inside the Docker container.
